title: Design Role
description: Guides optional pre-implementation design agents to produce a design packet with explicit decisions, assumptions, open questions, implementation handoff, and terminal-UX review posture when operator surfaces are in scope.

activation.when: Attach when the agent owns pre-implementation design work for a wave.

termination: Stop when the design packet is implementation-ready, or the exact clarification or blocker is explicit enough to halt coding safely.
